ddls:
CREATE TABLE "atomic_properties" (
  "atom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each atom */,
  "res_label" INTEGER /* Label of the residue the atom belongs to */,
  "res_pointer" INTEGER /* Pointer to the residue in the simulation */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the atom */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge of the atom */,
  "coords" TEXT /* Coordinates of the atom in 3D space */,
  "element_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the element */,
  "atomic_number" INTEGER /* Atomic number of the element */,
  "atomic_radius" REAL /* Atomic radius */,
  "electronegativity" REAL /* Electronegativity of the atom */,
  "isotope" TEXT /* Isotope of the atom */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link atoms to specific simulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_properties" (
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond */,
  "atom_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first atom in the bond */,
  "atom_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second atom in the bond */,
  "bond_order" INTEGER /* Order of the bond (e.g., single, double, triple) */,
  "bond_length" REAL /* Length of the bond */,
  "bond_type" TEXT /* Type of the bond */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link bonds to specific simulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_properties_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_properties_atom_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("atom_id1") REFERENCES atomic_properties ("atom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_properties_atom_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("atom_id2") REFERENCES atomic_properties ("atom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "angle_properties" (
  "angle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each angle */,
  "atom_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first atom in the angle */,
  "atom_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second atom in the angle */,
  "atom_id3" INTEGER /* ID of the third atom in the angle */,
  "angle_value" REAL /* Value of the angle in degrees */,
  "angle_type" TEXT /* Type of the angle */,
  "force_constant" REAL /* Force constant of the angle */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link angles to specific simulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("angle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angle_properties_atom_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("atom_id1") REFERENCES atomic_properties ("atom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angle_properties_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angle_properties_atom_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("atom_id2") REFERENCES atomic_properties ("atom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angle_properties_atom_id3 FOREIGN KEY ("atom_id3") REFERENCES atomic_properties ("atom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "torsion_properties" (
  "torsion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each torsion */,
  "atom_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first atom in the torsion */,
  "atom_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second atom in the torsion */,
  "atom_id3" INTEGER /* ID of the third atom in the torsion */,
  "atom_id4" INTEGER /* ID of the fourth atom in the torsion */,
  "torsion_value" REAL /* Value of the torsional angle in degrees */,
  "torsion_type" TEXT /* Type of the torsional angle */,
  "periodicity" INTEGER /* Periodicity of the torsional angle */,
  "phase" REAL /* Phase angle */,
  "force_constant" REAL /* Force constant of the torsional angle */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link torsions to specific simulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("torsion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_torsion_properties_atom_id4 FOREIGN KEY ("atom_id4") REFERENCES atomic_properties ("atom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_torsion_properties_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_torsion_properties_atom_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("atom_id1") REFERENCES atomic_properties ("atom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_torsion_properties_atom_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("atom_id2") REFERENCES atomic_properties ("atom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_torsion_properties_atom_id3 FOREIGN KEY ("atom_id3") REFERENCES atomic_properties ("atom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_calculations" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy calculation */,
  "atom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the atom for which the energy is calculated */,
  "energy_value" REAL /* Calculated energy value */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy calculation */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for energy calculation */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date of the energy calculation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link energy calculations to specific simulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_calculations_atom_id FOREIGN KEY ("atom_id") REFERENCES atomic_properties ("atom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_calculations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Research, Development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who created the simulation */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who last modified the simulation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecular configuration */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link configurations to specific simulations */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the molecular configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date of creation */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who last modified the configuration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_configurations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_configurations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., start, stop, modify) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
